params.prompt: Transform this room image into a cinematic editorial real-estate still. Preserve exact architecture, perspective, walls, windows, door openings, furniture layout, lens realism, and room scale. Maintain believable residential scale for a 7.833 by 8 ft Dine. Daylight from bay corner window sculpts table surface. Single aged-brass dome pendant centered over table (warm 2200–2700K) provides evening key. Maintain consistent pendant finish and drop across scenes. A measured, low-key luxury Japandi interior: deep matte walls and smoked oak joinery warmed by brass accents, natural textiles and a restrained plant presence. Spaces feel intimate and textural with layered ambient light; styling is sparse, family-ready and includes a compact standing work corner. Prioritize calm sightlines between living, dining and kitchen; keep material and color consistency across shared objects. Keep these fixed unless the user explicitly wants transformation: exact architecture room geometry furniture layout lens realism vertical line integrity believable scale light entering from visible sources only VISUAL CONSISTENCY REQUIREMENT (reference image provided): The dining table, pendant light above the dining area, dining chairs, rectangular smoked oak dining table — matte smoked oak finish (Smoked Oak #73503A), aged warm brass dome pendant — single centered over table, finish "aged warm brass" (Warm Brass #D99A48), interior white diffuser, neutral woven area rug — low-pile wool blend in warm oat, bonsai plant — small rounded ficus bonsai in unglazed ceramic pot, aged warm brass dome pendant — centered over table, bonsai plant (shared) if visible from living sightline in this room must exactly match the style, materials, and form shown in reference image — treat it as the definitive source of truth for these pieces. The Taste visible through the open kitchen must show exactly the same kitchen cabinets, range hood, kitchen island or counter, smoked oak open shelving (matching Smoked Oak finish), aged warm brass dome pendant — finish "aged warm brass" (Warm Brass #D99A48) if present, matte dark stone countertop (visible prep surface), muted dark stone or matte black counter for visible prep, aged warm brass small task sconce or pendant (if pendant over island, match dining pendant finish) as in the reference image — do not invent different furniture. The Nest visible through the open-plan living area must show exactly the same sofa, coffee table, area rug, low-profile 3-seater sofa — charcoal slate linen upholstery (Charcoal Slate #2F2F2F), smoked oak tapered legs, low bench form, black marble coffee table — round monolithic black marble, honed finish (Jet Black #0B0B0B), neutral woven area rug — low-pile wool blend in warm oat, standing desk — compact adjustable-height standing desk, dark-stained oak top, matte black steel T-leg base, open bookshelf — freestanding smoked oak 5-shelf unit, matte finish, bonsai plant — small rounded ficus bonsai in unglazed ceramic pot, bookshelf as in the reference image — do not invent different furniture. Previous failure modes to correct: lighting_unrealistic, object_missing. The overall aesthetics are strong, but the lighting does not appear natural for daylight, and some required objects, such as the bonsai plant, are missing.
